headline: Assessing Dollar Tree (DLTR) Valuation After Recent Share Price Slide And Undervaluation Signal
summary: Event driven move in Dollar Tree stock Dollar Tree (DLTR) has been on investors’ radar after a recent share price slide, with the stock down about 16% over the past month and 14% over the past 3 months from its last close near US$107. See our latest analysis for Dollar Tree. The recent slide comes after a much stronger run, with Dollar Tree posting a 1-year total shareholder return of 47.08% even as the 30 day share price return sits at a 16.21% decline and momentum has cooled. If this retail...

headline: Dollar Tree has surprising pricing update
summary: For years, Dollar Tree built its brand on a simple promise. No matter what item you stumbled upon in the store, you were able to buy it for $1. But in today’s economy, that promise has evolved. It's been years since Dollar Tree's base price point was actually $1. In the wake of the ...
